features: JOHNSON'S Baby Products – specifically designed for delicate skin and hair / Formulated to minimise the risk of allergies
Mild-Formula – free from dyes, parabens, phthalates, and alcohol / Leaves gentle fragrance after massage
Ideal for a baby massage / Moisturises and protects delicate skin from dryness
Great for kids and adults too / Only high quality ingredients gentle for delicate skin
1 x JOHNSON'S baby oil 300ml / Paediatrician and dermatologist-tested
description: Product Description When a baby is born, their skin is at its most delicate. That’s why we perfected our formulas over 125 years so they’re now even more gentle for all. Our Aloe Vera Oil instantly hydrates and nourishes delicate skin, leaving it feeling soft and healthy. Connect with your baby through touch! Use baby oil during a baby massage for a bonding experience that is relaxing for both you and your little one. Great for kids and adults too!. Manufacturer Contact Information IE: Johnson & Johnson GmbH Platz 2. D-41470 Neuss Germany
